series_metadata.series_description: MRDD uses Individual Information Forms (IIF)that are submitted by the county board to develop the sample used in their review process. "IIF Information" includes demographic information specific to an individual receiving services, including date of birth, address, county of residence, family dynamics, types of county board programs/services utilized. NOTE: These units use the information that is gathered by another Department, and are not considered the primary holder of these records.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 years ; Electronic: Retain for 6 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Shred
